message:
refactor(freeze): Extract 133 shared opcodes into emitCommonOpcode

Removes ~2086 lines of duplicate code between emitInstruction and
emitTrampolineInstruction by extracting shared opcodes into a new
emitCommonOpcode function.

Benefits:
- Single source of truth for 133 shared opcodes
- When adding Zig support to an opcode, only ONE place needs updating
  (previously required updating BOTH emitInstruction AND emitTrampolineInstruction)
- Eliminates duplication between trampoline and main execution paths

Changes:
- Add emitCommonOpcode(instr) !bool function (returns true if handled)
- Call emitCommonOpcode before switch in both emitInstruction and emitTrampolineInstruction
- Remove 133 shared opcodes from both functions
- Update insert_and_update.py to prefer fixed version of emit_common_opcode.zig

File size: 4629 → 2543 lines (-2086 lines, -45%)

Shared opcodes: add, add_brand, add_loc, apply, call, call0-3, check_brand,
check_ctor, check_ctor_return, copy_data_properties, dec, dec_loc, define_method,
define_method_computed, define_private_field, div, drop, dup, dup1-3, eq,
for_in_next, for_in_start, for_of_next, for_of_start, get_arg, get_arg0-3,
get_loc0-3, get_private_field, get_ref_value, get_super, get_var_ref0, gt, gte,
in, inc, inc_loc, init_ctor, insert2-4, instanceof, is_null, is_undefined_or_null,
iterator_call, iterator_check_object, iterator_close, iterator_get_value_done,
iterator_next, lt, lte, make_var_ref, mod, mul, neg, neq, nip, nip1, object,
perm3-5, plus, pow, private_in, private_symbol, push_0-7, push_empty_string,
push_false, push_i8, push_i16, push_i32, push_minus1, push_this, push_true,
put_arg, put_arg0-3, put_field, put_loc0-3, put_private_field, put_ref_value,
regexp, rest, return_undef, rot3l, rot3r, rot4l, rot5l, sar, set_arg, set_loc0-3,
shl, shr, special_object, strict_eq, strict_neq, sub, swap, swap2,
tail_call_method, to_object, to_propkey, typeof, typeof_is_function,
typeof_is_undefined, undefined, xor

files.patch:
@@ -5,8 +5,10 @@
 
 import re
 
-# Read the generated emitCommonOpcode
-with open('/tmp/emit_common_opcode.zig', 'r') as f:
+# Read the generated emitCommonOpcode (use fixed version if available)
+import os
+emit_common_path = '/tmp/emit_common_opcode_fixed.zig' if os.path.exists('/tmp/emit_common_opcode_fixed.zig') else '/tmp/emit_common_opcode.zig'
+with open(emit_common_path, 'r') as f:
     common_opcode_func = f.read()
 
 # Read the source file
